<!--
Thanks for contributing to SpectraGlyph! A quick checklist before you submit:
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / README / CI only

## Verification

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] Manually ran `python main.py` and exercised the affected feature
- [ ] If DSP/audio changed: confirmed the watermark still appears in Audacity/Spek at the suggested settings
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` (or noted below why it doesn't apply)

## Screenshots / spectrograms

<!-- For UI or watermark changes, paste a before/after screenshot or spectrogram. -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 -->
